info.title: HMPPS Cell Sharing Risk Assessment API
info.description: API for viewing and managing CSRA reviews for prisoners

tags.name: CSRA Assessment
tags.description: Creates and completes new-model initial CSRA assessments for prisoners

tags.name: NOMIS Migration & Sync
tags.description: Endpoints for migrating and synchronising CSRA data from NOMIS

tags.name: hmpps-queue-resource-async
tags.description: Endpoints that are to be used by administrators only for managing SQS queues. All endpoints require the QUEUE_ADMIN role further information can be found in the hmpps-spring-boot-sqs project

put.summary: Submits the provisional (Day 1) stage of an initial CSRA assessment
put.description: Records the provisional answers and rating, setting the prisoner's interim CSRA result. Requires role ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW

parameters.name: assessmentId
parameters.description: The assessment id returned when the assessment was started

400.description: Invalid request, or the rating conflicts with a mandatory high-risk offence trigger

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW role

404.description: No such assessment for this prisoner

put.summary: Submits the final (Day 2) stage of an initial CSRA assessment
put.description: Records the final answers and rating, setting the prisoner's final CSRA result and, for a high-risk rating, the next review date. Requires role ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW

parameters.name: assessmentId
parameters.description: The assessment id returned when the assessment was started

400.description: Invalid request, or the rating conflicts with a mandatory high-risk offence trigger

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW role

404.description: No such assessment for this prisoner

post.summary: Synchronise a single CSRA review from NOMIS
post.description: Upserts a single CSRA review changed in NOMIS. Returns 201 when created, 200 when updated. Requires role PRISONER_CSRA__SYNC__RW.

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the PRISONER_CSRA__SYNC__RW role

post.summary: Migrate all CSRA reviews for a prisoner from NOMIS
post.description: Receives all of a prisoner's CSRA reviews from NOMIS and returns the assigned CSRA ids. Requires role PRISONER_CSRA__SYNC__RW.

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the PRISONER_CSRA__SYNC__RW role

post.summary: Starts a new initial CSRA assessment
post.description: Creates a draft assessment for the prisoner and records who started it. Returns 409 if an assessment is already in progress. Requires role ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__RW role

409.description: An assessment is already in progress for this prisoner

get.summary: Returns CSRA review for this ID

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__R role

get.description: A filtered, paginated list of a prisoner's recorded CSRAs (both new-model and legacy NOMIS-migrated), plus whole-history summary counts. Returns an empty list and zeroed summary when the prisoner has no CSRAs. Requires role ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__R

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Only include CSRAs recorded on or after this date (inclusive)

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Only include CSRAs recorded on or before this date (inclusive)

parameters.name: establishments
parameters.description: Only include CSRAs recorded at these prisons

parameters.name: ratings
parameters.description: Only include CSRAs in these rating buckets

items.description: A coarse CSRA rating bucket for filtering and summary counts

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__R role

get.summary: Returns a prisoner's current CSRA rating
get.description: The prisoner's current CSRA rating and its state (no rating / in progress / provisional / complete), plus the supporting comments, high-risk risk-to & vulnerability detail, and next review date. Returns a NO_RATING result rather than a 404 when the prisoner has no CSRA. Requires role ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__R

200.description: Returns the prisoner's current CSRA rating

403.description: Missing required role. Requires the ROLE_CSRA_REVIEW__R role

CsraAssessmentStageRequest.description: The answers and rating confirmed for one stage of an initial CSRA assessment

rating.description: The rating being confirmed for this stage

prisonId.description: The prison the assessment is being made at

assessmentComment.description: The assessment comment explaining the outcome

perChecked.description: Whether the Person Escort Record (PER) was checked

offenceMurderManslaughter.description: Evidence of murder, manslaughter or a life-threatening assault on another prisoner (mandatory high-risk trigger)

offenceAssistingSuicide.description: Evidence of assisting a suicide in custody (mandatory high-risk trigger)

offenceSexualAssault.description: Evidence of sexual assault of a same-sex adult victim (mandatory high-risk trigger)

offenceRepeatedViolence.description: Evidence of repeated violence in custody

offencePrejudiceMotivated.description: Evidence of offending or behaviour motivated by prejudice

offenceArson.description: Evidence of arson or fire setting

offenceKidnapHostage.description: Evidence of kidnap, hostage taking or false imprisonment

officerSpokeToPrisoner.description: Whether an officer has had a conversation with the prisoner about sharing a cell

likelyToHarmCellmate.description: Whether the prisoner is likely to cause harm to a cellmate

significantlyVulnerable.description: Whether the prisoner is significantly vulnerable to assault by others

causeForConcernSharing.description: Whether observed behaviour gives cause for concern about sharing a cell

otherHighRiskIndicators.description: Whether there are any other indicators the prisoner is high risk

seenByHealthcare.description: Whether the prisoner has been seen by healthcare

healthcareIncreasedRisk.description: Whether healthcare identified signs of increased risk

riskTo.description: For a high-risk rating, who the prisoner is a risk to

vulnerabilities.description: For a high-risk rating, the groups the prisoner is vulnerable due to

CsraRiskToDetail.description: A group the prisoner is a risk to, with optional free-text detail

details.description: Optional free text describing the risk

CsraVulnerabilityDetail.description: A group the prisoner is vulnerable due to, with optional free-text detail

details.description: Optional free text describing the vulnerability

CsraCurrentRating.description: A prisoner's current CSRA rating and its supporting detail

status.description: The state of the current rating

rating.description: The current rating (final if complete, otherwise the provisional/interim rating). Absent when there is no rating yet.

provisional.description: Whether the current rating is provisional (a final rating has not yet been confirmed)

reviewId.description: The id of the review that produced the current rating, if any

prisonId.description: The prison the current assessment/review took place at

assessmentComment.description: The final assessment comment (or, for a migrated legacy review, its review comment)

provisionalAssessmentComment.description: The provisional (Day 1) assessment comment, when the assessment was captured over two stages
provisionalAssessmentComment.example: PNC not checked on day 1. No evidence of increased risk.

riskTo.description: For a high-risk-specific rating, who the prisoner is a risk to

vulnerabilities.description: For a high-risk-specific rating, the groups the prisoner is vulnerable due to

provisionalDate.description: The date the provisional (Day 1) rating was given, if any

finalDate.description: The date the final rating was given, if any

nextReviewDate.description: The date the prisoner's next review is due, if any

startedBy.description: The username that started the current assessment

startedAt.description: When the current assessment was started

CsraAssessmentType.description: CSRA assessment type as configured in the NOMIS ASSESSMENTS table

CsraCommitteeCode.description: Assessment committee code (NOMIS reference domain ASSESS_COMM)

CsraLevel.description: A CSRA level (used for calculated, review and approved levels)

CsraQuestionDto.description: A question and its responses within a CSRA review section

CsraResponseDto.description: A single response to a CSRA question

CsraReviewDetailDto.description: A section of question and answer details within a CSRA review

CsraStatus.description: CSRA status: I = inactive, A = active, P = provisional

CsraSyncRequest.description: Request to synchronise a single CSRA review from NOMIS

csraReviewId.description: The DPS id of the review, present when it already exists in DPS

review.description: The CSRA review in legacy NOMIS format

NomisCsraReview.description: A single CSRA review in the legacy NOMIS format

bookingId.description: The booking id of the CSRA in Nomis - the first part of its id

nomisSequence.description: The sequence number of the CSRA in Nomis - the second part of its id

assessmentPrisonId.description: Prison where the assessment took place (NOMIS agencyId). Not currently populated by NOMIS.

placementPrisonId.description: A prison to be transferred to

createdDateTime.description: Timestamp for when the CSRA was created

createdBy.description: The user who created the CSRA

reviewPlacementPrisonId.description: A prison to be transferred to (from the review/approval)

reviewDetails.description: Question and answer details by section

SyncResult.description: Result of synchronising a single CSRA review

csraReviewId.description: The DPS id of the synchronised review

created.description: True if the review was created, false if it was updated

CsraMigrationResponse.description: Migrate response linking the created UUID with the Nomis id

id.description: The unique id of the CSRA review

bookingId.description: The booking id of the CSRA in Nomis - the first part of its id

nomisSequence.description: The sequence number of the CSRA in Nomis - the second part of its id

CsraReview.description: A cell sharing risk assessment review

id.description: The unique id of the CSRA review

prisonerNumber.description: The prisoner number the review belongs to

prisonId.description: The prison the assessment took place at (may be absent for older records)

assessmentDate.description: The date the assessment was started

interimResult.description: The interim result, issued when the review cannot be completed on the first day

interimResultDate.description: The date the interim result was given

finalResult.description: The final result of the review

finalResultDate.description: The date the final result was given

createdBy.description: The username that created the review

lastModifiedAt.description: When the review was last updated

lastModifiedBy.description: The username that last updated the review

CsraEstablishment.description: An establishment the prisoner has a CSRA at

prisonId.description: The prison id (the establishment filter key)

prisonName.description: The prison name, resolved from prison-register (falls back to the id)

CsraReviewHistory.description: A prisoner's CSRA history: whole-history summary counts plus a filtered, paginated list of reviews

summary.description: Summary counts over the prisoner's whole CSRA history (unaffected by list filters)

content.description: The page of CSRA reviews matching the requested filters

totalElements.description: Total number of reviews matching the filters

totalPages.description: Total number of pages for the filtered result

CsraReviewHistorySummary.description: Summary counts over a prisoner's whole CSRA history

highCount.description: Number of CSRAs with a high-risk rating (legacy High, or new general/specific)

standardCount.description: Number of CSRAs with a standard rating

firstAssessmentDate.description: The date of the earliest recorded CSRA

lastAssessmentDate.description: The date of the most recent recorded CSRA

lastHighDate.description: The date of the most recent high-risk CSRA

establishments.description: The distinct establishments the prisoner has CSRAs at, for the establishment filter (name-sorted)

CsraReviewSummary.description: A single CSRA review in a prisoner's history

id.description: The unique id of the CSRA review

rating.description: The recorded rating (final result if present, otherwise the interim result)

prisonId.description: The prison the CSRA was recorded at

recordedDate.description: The date the rating was recorded
